'''Kagami-no-Miya Shrine''' (鏡宮神社) refers to Shinto shrines in Japan.
* {{ill|Kagami-no-Miya Shrine (Takasaki)|ja|鏡宮神社 (高崎市)}} - Located in Koyagi-cho, Takasaki City, Gunma Prefecture. * {{ill|Kagami-no-Miya Shrine (Ise)|ja|鏡宮神社 (伊勢市)}} - Located in Asama-cho, Ise City, Mie Prefecture. A branch shrine of the {{ill|Kōtai Jingū|ja|皇大神宮}}.
